title: Anti-Corruption Layers Protect Domain Language

checks.description: anti-corruption-layer pattern is valid and production-covered
checks.command: rta check --pattern-specs --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --pattern-contracts --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --production --root fixtures/golden/pass

decision: An anti-corruption layer is a boundary pattern, not a T1 primitive. It belongs around adapters and published languages when external systems have their own model, and it translates external DTOs into RTA domain language before the domain sees them.
